test_cases.ideal: I think we should move forward with the proposal.

test_cases.name: self_correction
test_cases.input: Send the report to John actually no send it to Mike by end of day.
test_cases.ideal: Send the report to Mike by end of day.

test_cases.name: stutters

test_cases.ideal: We need to update the documentation before the release.

test_cases.name: technical_asr_errors
test_cases.input: The kubernetes cluster is running on version 1.28 and we need to upgrade the ingar controller.
test_cases.ideal: The Kubernetes cluster is running on version 1.28 and we need to upgrade the ingress controller.

test_cases.name: repeated_ideas
test_cases.input: We need to fix the login page. The login page is broken. Users can't log in. So basically the login is not working and we need to fix it as soon as possible.
test_cases.ideal: We need to fix the login page. Users can't log in and we need to fix it as soon as possible.

test_cases.name: long_complex
test_cases.input: So what I'm thinking is that we should probably restructure the entire frontend because right now it's a monolith and every time someone makes a change it breaks something else and the build times are getting really long like 15 minutes for a production build which is way too slow and it's killing our productivity.
test_cases.ideal: I'm thinking we should restructure the entire frontend because right now it's a monolith. Every time someone makes a change it breaks something else, and the build times are getting really long — 15 minutes for a production build, which is killing our productivity.

test_cases.name: numbers_stats
test_cases.input: Revenue increased by 23 percent last quarter from 4.2 million to 5.1 million and our customer base grew by about 15000 users.
test_cases.ideal: Revenue increased by 23% last quarter from $4.2 million to $5.1 million, and our customer base grew by about 15,000 users.

test_cases.name: email_greeting
test_cases.input: Hey Sarah I wanted to follow up on yesterday's meeting. Can you send me the updated budget by Friday? Thanks John
test_cases.ideal:
Hey Sarah,

I wanted to follow up on yesterday's meeting. Can you send me the updated budget by Friday?

test_cases.input: The deadline is Monday no wait Tuesday actually it's Wednesday because of the holiday.
test_cases.ideal: The deadline is Wednesday because of the holiday.

test_cases.name: spoken_punctuation
test_cases.input: Please send the files to john at example dot com and cc the team.
test_cases.ideal: Please send the files to john@example.com and cc the team.

test_cases.name: short_quick
test_cases.input: Sounds good let's do it.
test_cases.ideal: Sounds good, let's do it.

test_cases.name: mixed_fillers_corrections
test_cases.input: Um so I was thinking we could um use React no actually Vue would be better because it's lighter and um you know the team already knows it.
test_cases.ideal: I was thinking we could use Vue because it's lighter and the team already knows it.

test_cases.name: chirp_specific
test_cases.input: We just updated the Cherp app to use the Parrakeet model for transcription and it's working really well.
test_cases.ideal: We just updated the Chirp app to use the Parakeet model for transcription and it's working really well.

test_cases.name: list_dictation
test_cases.input: For the sprint we need to do three things. First fix the authentication bug. Second update the API documentation. And third deploy the new version to staging.
test_cases.ideal: For the sprint we need to do three things. First, fix the authentication bug. Second, update the API documentation. And third, deploy the new version to staging.

test_cases.name: casual_tone
test_cases.input: Yeah so like the thing is the client wants it done by next week but honestly I don't think that's realistic given where we are right now.
test_cases.ideal: The client wants it done by next week, but honestly I don't think that's realistic given where we are right now.

test_cases.name: heavy_stutters
test_cases.input: I I I think the the best approach would be to to first um first analyze the the data and then and then make a decision based on what we find.
test_cases.ideal: I think the best approach would be to first analyze the data and then make a decision based on what we find.

test_cases.name: domain_technical
test_cases.input: The CI CD pipeline is failing because the docker image can't pull from the private registry we need to update the credentials in the github actions secrets.
test_cases.ideal: The CI/CD pipeline is failing because the Docker image can't pull from the private registry. We need to update the credentials in the GitHub Actions secrets.

test_cases.name: emotional_frustrated
test_cases.input: This is the third time this week that the server has gone down and honestly I'm really frustrated because we keep saying we're going to fix it but nothing actually gets done.
test_cases.ideal: This is the third time this week that the server has gone down, and I'm really frustrated because we keep saying we're going to fix it but nothing actually gets done.

test_cases.name: original_chirp_test
test_cases.input: We just swapped out clen 2.53b for Gemma for E2B. And immediately we were getting better results with lower inference time. Something that we were exploring is integrating a new feature for Cherp to automatically screenshot and process which type of application you are working. in that way it can write out the words that you are saying with the proper formatting so for example if you are in an email client then it will detect that and ensure that the formatted output is made for an email client because Gemma has multimodal capacity where it can see images. We were exploring if Gemma could be used for that application. And at what point in the pipeline would it make sense for that step to go of the detection of which program you're working in.
test_cases.ideal: We just swapped out Qwen 2.5 3B for Gemma 4 E2B and immediately got better results with lower inference time. We're exploring integrating a new feature for Chirp to automatically screenshot and detect which application the user is working in, so the output is formatted accordingly. For example, if you're in an email client, it formats the output for email. Since Gemma has multimodal capabilities including image understanding, we're evaluating whether it could handle this detection step and where in the pipeline it should go.
